stances.name: Bare Knuckle
lv25_bonus_extra: None

skills.name: Plumbullet shot
skills.description: Fires a poisonous bullet.

skills.name: Double Firing
skills.description: Fire two rapid shots consecutively.

skills.name: Snap Shot
skills.description: Shoots 5 targets within a certain area.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.name: Zero-In
skills.description: Fires rapidly at a single enemy.

skills.name: Westraid
skills.description: Increases your shooting speed but sacrifices accuracy. A change of stance will cause you to lose this effect.

skills.name: Triple Firing
skills.description: A rapid attack of 3 shots.

skills.name: Quick and Dead
skills.description: Fires randomly at a group of enemies.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.name: Ankle Shot
skills.description: Shot to ankle of enemy.

skills.name: Barrage Shots
skills.description: Fires wildly at an area in front of you.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 7m away and within a 4m radius.

skills.name: Clincher
skills.description: Fires a critical shot at an enemy.

skills.name: Surpassing Shot
skills.description: Grievous damage on a single enemy.

stances.name: Wanted

skills.name: Sting Bringer
skills.description: Quickly targets your enemy to deliver a shot.

skills.name: Wanted Action
skills.description: Release all of ability of your body to obtain a [Free] status. It is cancelled when the stance is changed.

skills.name: Slider Shot
skills.description: Slide to the front to control your enemies.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 10m away and within a 5m radius

skills.name: Escape Shot
skills.description: Fling your body backwards to control the attack of an enemy while simultaneously firing a shot.

skills.name: Life Sentence
skills.description: Fires a strong shot that can control enemies around you by gathering your body power.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 12m away and within an 8m radius

Ignore additional DEF according to extra [DEX] * 4

skills.name: Westraid
skills.description: Increases your shooting speed but sacrifices accuracy. A change of stance will cause you to lose this effect.

skills.description: Fires mercilessly in all directions at surrounding enemies.

skills.name: Quattro Firing
skills.description: Fires 4 rapid shots at a single enemy.

skills.name: R.I.P.
skills.description: Fires a series of rapid shots at an enemy with dual pistols.

skills.name: Sapping Shots
skills.description: Fires at enemy (Unable to move the lower half of own body).

skills.name: Octet-stream
skills.description: Fires 8 times consecutively.

skills.name: Dancing Revolvers
skills.description: A frenzy of graceful shots at enemies.
skills.target: Up to 6 enemies 8m away and within a 4m radius.

skills.name: Desperados
skills.description: Random shots at enemies.

stances.name: Unlimited Shot

skills.name: Circle Shot
skills.description: Quickly targets the enemy in a circle to fire an accurate shot.

skills.name: Reload Action
skills.description: Reload to clear all your cooldowns and obtain an [Equilibrium] status. It is cancelled when the stance is changed.

skills.name: Circle Penetration
skills.description: Fire a series of rapid shots in succession to all enemies within a range.

skills.name: Back Slider
skills.description: While evading and firing simultaneously, quickly jump backwards.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.name: Death Sentence
skills.description: Jump to shoot a weak point located above head before finishing with a landing.

skills.description: Aims carefully at enemies, striking him in a critical area.
